role: Professor of nuclear engineering, Shahid Beheshti University; killed June 2025
bio:
Ahmad Reza Zolfaghari Daryani was a professor of nuclear engineering at [Shahid Beheshti University](/orgs/shahid-beheshti-university) in Tehran. He was killed on 13 June 2025 in Israeli airstrikes targeting Iran's nuclear infrastructure and scientific community — the opening attacks of [Operation Rising Lion](/events/israeli-strikes-iran-june-2025).

Note: He is a distinct individual from Ebrahim Zolfaghari (the IRGC military spokesperson) — different person, different background.
editorial_notes: Nuclear engineering professor at SBU. NOT the same as Ebrahim Zolfaghari (IRGC spokesperson). Killed 13 June 2025.
